lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon... where are we? The air smells of salt and... marble dust?

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Sa Via Nova. The Romans built this road centuries after my people. And yet here we are.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon, the mask is glowing! The ground here looks cracked...

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Try pressing K near the cracked floor! The Stone Slam should break it!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Using ancient talayotic power to smash Roman roads. My ancestors would approve.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: That soldier has a big shield! Your stones bounce right off!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Wait for him to lower his shield to attack, then strike! Or try the Stone Slam to stun him!

lines.speaker: llorencc
lines.text: Ah, un foner! I have goods from across the Mare Nostrum. Interested?

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: A merchant in the middle of a cursed road. Why not.
